redis.clients.jedis.graph.ResultSet

  • Packages that use ResultSet 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.graph
    This package contains the classes and interfaces related to RedisGraph module.

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis.graph that return ResultSet 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphQuery(String name, String query)
      Execute a Cypher query.
      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphQuery(String name, String query, long timeout)
      Execute a Cypher query with timeout.
      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphQuery(String name, String query, Map<String,Object> params)
      Executes a cypher query with parameters.
      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphQuery(String name, String query, Map<String,Object> params, long timeout)
      Executes a cypher query with parameters and timeout.
      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphReadonlyQuery(String name, String query)
      Execute a Cypher read-only query.
      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphReadonlyQuery(String name, String query, long timeout)
      Execute a Cypher read-only query with timeout.

      ResultSet RedisGraphCommands.graphReadonlyQuery(String name, String query, Map<String,Object> params, long timeout)
      Executes a cypher read-only query with parameters and timeout.
